Off Calendar Aug-14-2023 Continued To Oct-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Mark Malachowski appearing via zoom for and with Sandi Fuerte (petitioner).
Edward Thirkell appearing via zoom for Daiane Akers (respondent).

Mr. Thrikill stated that the petition was filed on Friday. The Court stated everything filed needs to be reviewed by the examiner and will continue this matter. Petition to compel redress of breach of trust etc., is continued to October 11, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Redress Of Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Aug-01-2022 Off Calendar

Petition To Compel Redress Of Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Continued To Aug-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Accounting
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Off Calendar

Petition To Compel Redress Of Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Continued To Jul-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alexander Biddle, via Zoom, for Sandi Fuerte, Petitioner; Brent Kato, via Zoom, for Diane Akers, Trustee.

Mr. Biddle reports that he's received the accounting from Mr. Kato but has yet to review it. Counsel confirm that they would like a continuance in order to discuss resolving the issues between themselves. The court mentions the position of the two petitions before it and confirms that if the accounting is sufficient, the Petitioner would request to take the Petition to Compel Redress, etc., off calendar.

The matters are continued to Jul-25-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Accounting
Off Calendar May-23-2022 Continued To Jul-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-07-2022 Continued To May-23-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Redress Of Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-07-2022 Continued To May-23-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alexander Biddle, via ZOOM, for Sandi Fuerte, Petitioner; Brent Kato, via ZOOM, for Diane Akers, Trustee.

Mr. Kato reports that he has made progress with the accounting and Inventory and Appraisal and asks for a 30-day continuance. Mr. Kato reports providing Mr. Biddle with documents which is confirmed by Mr. Biddle who advises that he does not object to Mr. Kato's request for a continuance. After additional discussion, the court instructs Mr. Kato to provide Mr. Biddle with an informal accounting by the next calling of this matter or the court will consider ordering a formal accounting. Mr. Kato agrees to discuss the informal accounting with Mr. Biddle to clarify what Mr. Biddle is expecting from the informal accounting.

The Petition to Compel Redress, etc., and Status of Accounting are continued to May-23-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Mr. Kato is instructed to provide Mr. Biddle with an informal accounting as described above by Apr-04-2022.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: C. Gomez. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Redress Of Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-10-2022 Continued To Mar-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alexander Biddle, via ZOOM, for Sandi Fuerte, Petitioner; Brent Kato, via ZOOM, for Diane Akers, Respondent.

Mr. Kato reports that he has provided information to Mr. Biddle and will send additional information as it's received. Mr. Biddle confirms receipt of some documents but reports that some issues remain outstanding. Mr. Kato offers to meet and confer to resolve issues with accounting. The court advises that it is considering ordering an accounting. After additional discussion, the court advises that it is ordering an accounting to cover the dates from Jan-01-2020 to Dec-31-2021.

The Petition to Compel Redress of Breach of Trust is continued to Mar-07-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status of Accounting is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody (via ZOOM). Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition To Compel Redress Of Breach Of Trust
Off Calendar Nov-08-2021 Continued To Jan-10-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Pamela Bobowski, via ZOOM, for Sandi Fuerte, Petitioner; Brent Kato, via ZOOM, for Diane Akers, Trustee.

The court notes the issue regarding venue and allows counsel to advocate their positions. Mr. Kato reports that venue is proper because the trust was established in San Francisco, all the assets are in San Francisco and that his client frequently travels to San Francisco to administer the estate. Mr. Kato also reports that there have been delays in providing information to the Petitioner as his client has been attending to her mother and will require additional time to provide that information. Ms. Bobowski reports that she requested information in August and has yet to receive a reply and that she does not object to a continuance but would like the information she requested. Ms. Bobowski advises that she is open to participating in pro bono mediation. The court asks for an update regarding the relocation of the mother. Mr. Kato advises that the mother has been at the facility she is at for a few weeks now and that he should have information regarding the preceding in a few weeks.

After additional discussion, the Petition to Compel Redress of Breach of Trust is continued to Jan-10-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
